title: BREAKING: US Government BANNED Mythos and Fable
summary: The US government issued an export control directive forcing Anthropic to disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all customers immediately. The announcement references an official communication from Anthropic regarding the access restrictions.
writeup: The video reports a US government export control directive that forces Anthropic to disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all customers immediately, citing an official communication from Anthropic about the access restrictions. The case matters because it shows export controls reaching directly into deployed AI models, cutting off access regardless of customer or use. The concrete takeaway: a regulatory order, rather than a technical failure or company decision, triggered the shutdown of named Claude models across the board.
